requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and INTECO Conformity — RTCR Electrical Code Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线与INTECO合规——RTCR电气规范要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線與INTECO合規——RTCR電氣規範要求

summary.en: INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica) is Costa Rica's national standards body and ISO member. Costa Rica adopts IEC standards through INTECO's INTE series; a specific mandatory RTCR (Reglamento Técnico de Costa Rica) for EV charging equipment analogous to a complete whole-unit mandatory certification scheme could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. However, the following safety and installation requirements are applicable: (1) The RTCR 475:2015 Código Eléctrico de Costa Rica (based on NFPA 70 / NEC, including NEC Article 625 on EV charging equipment) sets the electrical installation baseline and is mandatory for licensed installations; (2) IEC 61851-1 is the international conductive EV charging safety standard and is the reference framework cited by IEC-aligned conformity assessors and project owners; (3) IEC 61851-23:2023 applies to DC EV supply equipment; (4) enclosure ingress protection requirements in Costa Rica's tropical climate (high humidity, rainfall) differ from desert or arid environments — IP54 minimum is a common project requirement for DC outdoor units; (5) INTECO-published INTE ISO/IEC standards may be cited by project owners or network operators. Exporters should confirm with INTECO and the project owner which INTE/IEC standards and which RTCR editions are mandatory for the specific product and installation.
summary.zh: INTECO（哥斯达黎加技术标准研究院）是哥斯达黎加国家标准机构及ISO成员。哥斯达黎加通过INTECO的INTE系列采用IEC标准；截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认存在类似完整整机强制认证方案的针对电动汽车充电设备的具体强制性RTCR（哥斯达黎加技术法规）。但以下安全和安装要求适用：(1) RTCR 475:2015《哥斯达黎加电气法规》（基于NFPA 70 / NEC，包括NEC Article 625电动汽车充电设备规定）设定了电气安装基线，对持证安装具有强制性；(2) IEC 61851-1是国际传导式电动汽车充电安全标准，是IEC体系合格评定机构和项目业主引用的参考框架；(3) IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车供电设备；(4) 哥斯达黎加热带气候（高湿度、多降雨）下的外壳防护等级要求与沙漠或干燥环境不同——IP54最低防护等级是直流户外设备的常见项目要求；(5) INTECO发布的INTE ISO/IEC标准可能由项目业主或网络运营商引用。出口商应向INTECO和项目业主确认具体产品和安装适用的强制性INTE / IEC标准及RTCR版本。
summary.zht: INTECO（哥斯大黎加技術標準研究院）是哥斯大黎加國家標準機構及ISO成員。哥斯大黎加通過INTECO的INTE系列採用IEC標準；截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認存在類似完整整機強制認證方案的針對電動汽車充電設備的具體強制性RTCR（哥斯大黎加技術法規）。但以下安全和安裝要求適用：(1) RTCR 475:2015《哥斯大黎加電氣法規》（基於NFPA 70 / NEC，包括NEC Article 625電動汽車充電設備規定）設定了電氣安裝基線，對持證安裝具有強制性；(2) IEC 61851-1是國際傳導式電動汽車充電安全標準，是IEC體系合格評定機構和項目業主引用的參考框架；(3) IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車供電設備；(4) 哥斯大黎加熱帶氣候（高濕度、多降雨）下的外殼防護等級要求與沙漠或乾燥環境不同——IP54最低防護等級是直流戶外設備的常見項目要求；(5) INTECO發布的INTE ISO/IEC標準可能由項目業主或網絡運營商引用。出口商應向INTECO和項目業主確認具體產品和安裝適用的強制性INTE / IEC標準及RTCR版本。

standards_or_laws: RTCR 475:2015 — Código Eléctrico de Costa Rica (based on NFPA 70 / NEC, including NEC Article 625 — Electric Vehicle Charging System)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum for outdoor DC units in tropical climate context
INTECO (inteco.or.cr) — INTE series IEC-aligned national standards
SAE J1772 — conductive charge coupler (Type 1 AC, 120/240 V, 60 Hz)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports or NEC-compliant installation documentation required for Costa Rica. Additionally, China domestic thermal design is optimized for 50 Hz systems and for drier northern China climates; Costa Rica's tropical humid environment (high rainfall, >80% relative humidity in many regions) requires separate verification of moisture ingress protection, anti-corrosion treatment, and tropical-climate suitability.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代哥斯达黎加所需的IEC 61851认可测试报告或符合NEC的安装文件。此外，中国国内热设计针对50 Hz系统及中国北方较干燥气候优化；哥斯达黎加热带潮湿环境（高降雨量，许多地区相对湿度>80%）需要对防潮保护、防腐处理和热带气候适用性进行单独验证。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代哥斯大黎加所需的IEC 61851認可測試報告或符合NEC的安裝文件。此外，中國國內熱設計針對50 Hz系統及中國北方較乾燥氣候優化；哥斯大黎加熱帶潮濕環境（高降雨量，許多地區相對濕度>80%）需要對防潮保護、防腐處理和熱帶氣候適用性進行單獨驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause-level compliance matrix and accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; (3) IP-rated enclosure certificates appropriate for tropical outdoor deployment (confirm IP rating requirement with site owner — IP54 minimum for DC outdoor; IP55+ preferred in high-rainfall locations); (4) anti-corrosion and tropical humidity suitability data; (5) NEC Article 625 compatibility documentation for installations under the RTCR 475 electrical code; (6) thermal evidence for 60 Hz operation and ambient temperatures up to 35–40 °C (Costa Rica lowlands); (7) Spanish-language installation and safety manuals as required by RTCR and project owners. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条合规矩阵及ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；(2) 直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) 适合热带室外部署的IP防护等级认证书（向场地业主确认IP要求——直流室外最低IP54，高降雨量地区建议IP55以上）；(4) 防腐和热带湿度适用性数据；(5) RTCR 475电气规范下安装所需的NEC Article 625兼容性文件；(6) 60 Hz运行及哥斯达黎加低地环境温度（最高35–40°C）的热环境证据；(7) RTCR及项目业主要求的西班牙语安装和安全手册。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條合規矩陣及ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；(2) 直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) 適合熱帶室外部署的IP防護等級認證書（向場地業主確認IP要求——直流室外最低IP54，高降雨量地區建議IP55以上）；(4) 防腐和熱帶濕度適用性數據；(5) RTCR 475電氣規範下安裝所需的NEC Article 625兼容性文件；(6) 60 Hz運行及哥斯大黎加低地環境溫度（最高35–40°C）的熱環境證據；(7) RTCR及項目業主要求的西班牙語安裝和安全手冊。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory installation baseline — RTCR 475:2015 (NEC Article 625) is the mandatory electrical installation standard for licensed contractors in Costa Rica; IEC 61851 safety evidence is cited by project owners and network operators; confirm exact INTECO/RTCR mandatory product certification scope with INTECO before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 or NEC-aligned evidence in Costa Rica without additional accredited testing and clause mapping

source.publisher: INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Costa Rica-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates appropriate for tropical humidity, NEC Article 625 installation compliance under RTCR 475, and Spanish-language safety documentation. Confirm the mandatory RTCR / INTECO product-certification scope with INTECO before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向哥斯达黎加的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适合热带湿度的IP防护等级认证书、RTCR 475下的NEC Article 625安装合规，以及西班牙语安全文件。在发货前应向INTECO确认强制性RTCR / INTECO产品认证适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向哥斯大黎加的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適合熱帶濕度的IP防護等級認證書、RTCR 475下的NEC Article 625安裝合規，以及西班牙語安全文件。在發貨前應向INTECO確認強制性RTCR / INTECO產品認證適用範圍。
